mapper.sql: select id, user_id, course_id, enrollment_date, progress_percent, status, current_lesson_id, start_date, completion_date, certificate_url, is_favorite, rating, review, create_time, update_time from edu_user_course
mapper.insert: insert into edu_user_course ( user_id, course_id, enrollment_date, progress_percent, status, current_lesson_id, start_date, completion_date, certificate_url, is_favorite, rating, review, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{enrollmentDate}, #{progressPercent}, #{status}, #{currentLessonId}, #{startDate}, #{completionDate}, #{certificateUrl}, #{isFavorite}, #{rating}, #{review}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from edu_user_course where user_id = #{userId} and course_id = #{courseId}
